  • Constructor Details

    • RandomAccessList

      public RandomAccessList()

  • Method Details

    • remove

      public T remove(T object)
      Description copied from interface: IRandomAccessList
      Removes the corresponding object from the list. Returns the object that was removed or null if the list does not contain the object.

      More specifically, this removes and returns the object o such that o.equals(object) == true.

      Specified by:
      remove in interface IRandomAccessList<T>
      Parameters:
      object - the object to remove
      Returns:
      the object removed or null

    • add

      public void add(T object)
      Description copied from interface: IRandomAccessList
      Adds the given object to the end of this list. If this list already contains the object, the list remains unchanged.
      Specified by:
      add in interface IRandomAccessList<T>
      Parameters:
      object - the object to add

    • contains

      public boolean contains(T object)
      Description copied from interface: IRandomAccessList
      Return true if this list contains the specified object or false otherwise.

      More formally, returns true if and only if this list contains the object o such that o.equals(object).

      Specified by:
      contains in interface IRandomAccessList<T>
      Parameters:
      object - object whose presence in the list is to be tested
      Returns:
      true if this list contains the object, false otherwise

    • get

      public T get(T object)
      Description copied from interface: IRandomAccessList
      Retrieves the given object from the list. Returns the object that is in the list or null if the object is not in the list.

      More specifically, this returns the object o such that o.equals(object) == true.

      Specified by:
      get in interface IRandomAccessList<T>
      Parameters:
      object - the object to retrieve
      Returns:
      the retrieved object or null

    • size

      public int size()
      Description copied from interface: IRandomAccessList
      Returns the number of elements in this list. If this list contains more than Integer.MAX_VALUE elements, returns Integer.MAX_VALUE.
      Specified by:
      size in interface IRandomAccessList<T>
      Returns:
      the number of elements in this list.

    • iterator

      public ResetIterator<T> iterator()
      Description copied from interface: IRandomAccessList
      Returns a reset iterator of the elements in this list (in proper sequence).

      This iterator does not throw a ConcurrentModificationException when the list is modified while iterating.

      Specified by:
      iterator in interface IRandomAccessList<T>
      Specified by:
      iterator in interface Iterable<T>
      Returns:
      a reset iterator of the elements in this list (in proper sequence)

      private void updateIterators(T object)

      private T internalRemove(T object)

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Description copied from interface: IRandomAccessList
      Returns true if this list contains no elements.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
